feed.title: Bitcoin Core v31.1rc1 is now available

entry.title: Bitcoin Core v31.1rc1 is now available
entry.summary:
The latest release candidate for Bitcoin Core, version v31.1rc1, is now available for download and testing. Interested parties can access the binaries from [Bitcoin Core's official page](https://bitcoincore.org/bin/bitcoin-core-31.1/test.rc1/) and find the source code on GitHub under a signed tag located at [this link](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/tree/v31.1rc1). This minor version release serves as a precursor to the final release, pending no critical issues are identified during testing.
Detailed preliminary release notes that outline the updates and changes in this version are accessible through [GitHub](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/v31.1rc1/doc/release-notes.md). As part of the development process, users encountering any issues with this release candidate are encouraged to report them directly to the project's issues page on GitHub, which can be found [here](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/issues).
This notification was sent to members of the "Bitcoin Development Mailing List" as part of routine communications regarding updates and progress in the development of Bitcoin Core. The feedback from these tests will be crucial in determining the stability of the release candidate and its progression to the next stable release tagged as v31.1.
